'''Sella Marik''' was a reporter for [[Galaxy 9 News]] during the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. She reported on the assassination attempt on Senator [[Drextar Pym]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Shard of Alderaan|book=Live-Action Adventures}}
*{{JournalCite|7|Countdown to Disaster}} {{1st}}
